content.text: Run hot enough to matter. Vent before it sticks.

The Leech is the management-puzzle tree. It deliberately injects Charge — the acute layer of rift toxicity — and converts the heat into power. The meters, the vent, and the career bill live on Charge & Saturation; this page is the machine that runs them hot on purpose.
Two branches, two valves. Furnace burns yourself for output: you are the fuel, and the valve is the bill. Parasite makes others pay: the valve is the victim, and access is the puzzle.
Self-administered thermal load is classified as voluntary enhancement under schedule C. Detox services are available at preferred-partner rates. The glow is not covered.

content.stat_lean: Grit — the free vent at encounter's end is your Grit bonus, and the Furnace lives or dies by it (see Charge & Saturation).
content.theme: Deliberate Charge injection: Burn turns heat into dice; Offload turns Charge into someone else's problem.
content.design: The management puzzle — run hot enough to matter, vent before it sticks.

content.text: The Engine — Burn

Burn (1 AP): gain 2 Charge and 1 Burn stack. Burn is unlocked by Leech Manifold, the tree's entry augment. Stacks are capped — 1 at entry, 2 with Combustion Lining — and power the Furnace branch. Charge itself — the 0–10 meter, what happens at 7+ and at 10, and the end-of-encounter vent — lives on Charge & Saturation.

What the stacks buy is dice. Heat Bleed adds +1 damage die at 1+ Burns; Furnace Core raises it to +1 die per Burn, max +2 — the Leech ceiling. Validated: two Burns take a longsword from 9.5 to 19.1 per swing against flesh. But extra dice die against armor like all dice do — 6.9 through Contractor Standard, about 0.1 through Heavy Plate. The Furnace melts flesh; it does not open cans.

Opening cans is the Parasite's job. Offload moves Charge into a grappled enemy as direct damage — ignoring Value and Absorb entirely (tags — see Attacks & the Shell Clock) — roughly 3 armor-proof damage a round against the Furnace's 0.1 through Plate. Your detox bill, paid in their blood.

content.label: DESIGN GAP
content.text: How long a Burn stack lasts is not stated — whether stacks clear at encounter's end, on vent, or persist. Reactor Heart's free Burn at encounter start implies per-encounter tracking, but nothing prints it. The interface line also says stacks “cap by tier,” yet the only printed cap raise is Combustion Lining's 2.
The Bill

Every tree pays a creditor; the Leech pays the doc. A hot mission runs about 6 Saturation past the free vent — roughly 300 credits of street-tier detox against a 500-credit base pay. The Furnace tithes some 60% of its income to run hot, or banks the Saturation toward thresholds and pays later, with interest. The thresholds and the detox lane live on Charge & Saturation.
Counterplay, Printed
The bill — the Furnace dies to its own ledger in long campaigns without Grit investment or a Street Doc.
Range — the Parasite starves at range; everything here wants a body in hand.
Discipline — squads that never let a member be grappled alone starve the Parasite.
Hide — Siphon Fangs' base version only feeds on Flesh; fighting big game as a Parasite is hungry work until Marrow Tap.
The Catalog
Install costs follow the standard ladder (Trees Overview). Nineteen augments; Tier 5 means choosing ten. Capstones are marked; one purchase is a trade-off.

augments.name: Leech Manifold
augments.effect: Unlocks Burn — 1 AP: gain 2 Charge and 1 Burn stack (max 1). Your veins learn to carry it.

content.text: Furnace Branch — Burn Yourself for Output

augments.name: Combustion Lining
augments.effect: +1 max Burn stack (2 total at this tier's gate).

augments.name: Heat Bleed
augments.effect: While at 1+ Burns, your melee attacks add +1 damage die.

augments.name: Stoked Reflexes
augments.effect: While at 2+ Burns, +1 band of movement per turn.

augments.name: Furnace Core
augments.effect: Your Burn dice cap rises: +1 damage die per Burn, max +2 — the Leech ceiling.

augments.name: Ash Sweat
augments.effect: Once per fight, 1 AP: vent 2 Charge mid-combat. The only in-fight valve — it visibly steams.

augments.name: Overdrive Governor
augments.effect: Trade-off. Burn grants +3 Charge instead of +2, and +1 flat damage per Burn. The discount is the extra heat.

augments.name: Flash Vent
augments.effect: 2 AP: dump all your Charge — enemies in your Adjacent cluster take direct damage equal to the Charge dumped (max 6). Heat goes somewhere.

augments.name: Cinder Plating
augments.effect: While at 2+ Burns, personal Absorb 1. The heat haze between you and the world.

augments.name: Reactor Heart
augments.effect: Capstone. Start every encounter with 1 free Burn, and your free vent at encounter's end is your Grit bonus +2. You are no longer borrowing the heat. You live there.

content.text: Parasite Branch — Make Others Pay

augments.name: Siphon Fangs
augments.effect: Your melee hits against Flesh targets heal you 1 (max 3 per turn).

augments.name: Tick Anchor
augments.effect: Advantage on grapple contests against targets you damaged this turn.

augments.name: Hungry Wiring
augments.effect: When an Adjacent enemy dies, recover 2 HP and shed 1 Charge into the corpse.

augments.name: Offload
augments.effect: 2 AP: transfer up to 3 Charge into a grappled or pinned enemy as direct damage — it ignores Value and Absorb entirely. Your detox bill, paid in their blood.

augments.name: Marrow Tap
augments.effect: While grappling, Siphon Fangs heals 2 per hit and works on any body type.

augments.name: Saprophage Filter
augments.effect: Carving checks on your own kills gain advantage, and glands you harvest personally grade +1. The body knows what it wants.

augments.name: Glut Reserve
augments.effect: Overheal from your siphons becomes temp HP (cap 6).

augments.name: Contagious Heat
augments.effect: Enemies that start their turn grappled by you gain 1 Charge; at 4+ Charge they take the Seared condition (see Conditions). You are a disease with a salary.

content.label: DESIGN GAP
content.text: Contagious Heat applies “the Seared condition” with no X value. Seared is numbered (see Conditions); the stack the Leech applies is unspecified.

augments.name: Apex Parasite
augments.effect: Capstone. Offload's range becomes your Adjacent cluster — no grapple needed, one target per turn — and each Offload heals you half the Charge transferred. The food chain has an opinion about where you sit now.

content.text: Your wellness provider has flagged recurring saturation in your quarterly screen. A payment plan is available. Thank you for running hot on the company's behalf.
